producerReviews.requiredCorrection: Add marker-owned fault-injected TeamBackupService characterization and record a diff check that covers untracked additions.

Model real crash transitions at every required boundary, reconcile retry classes with W3, complete fingerprint vectors, use an independent mutation census, and record a diff check that covers untracked additions.

findings.summary: TeamBackupService fault outcomes are source deductions, not the full packet's required fault-injected characterization.
Commit, compensation, and event-publication labels are counted as exercised without real crash/resume transitions.
Task and inbox effects are marked idempotent despite W3 proving active writers uncoordinated and durable lookup unproven.
Golden vectors omit fingerprint-version change and omitted-versus-default behavior.
The required mutation census is derived from the generated catalog, so omissions cannot fail generation.
Plain git diff --check did not inspect either producer's entirely untracked additions; reviewer no-index checks were clean.

checks.command: W3: node sqlite-online-backup-spike.mjs; node external-writer-negative-fixture.mjs; node verify-evidence.mjs; node --test state-writers.test.mjs
W3 targeted eslint --no-cache over all owned JavaScript
W5 targeted eslint --no-cache over all owned JavaScript

checks.result: 15 W3 files and 15 W5 files checked; zero whitespace findings

checks.command: high-confidence secret and real-user-path scan over every handoff-listed file

crossLaneAssumptions.assumption: Task and native inbox effects are idempotent by operation ID during an active external writer.
crossLaneAssumptions.w3Evidence: Task locks are process-local and native inbox lock adoption is unproven; both are quiescent-only.
crossLaneAssumptions.w5Evidence: The op helper assigns idempotent_by_operation_id with partial/unversioned current evidence.

crossLaneAssumptions.assumption: One SQLite transaction/worker seam can host command, event, keyring, and backup coordination.
crossLaneAssumptions.w3Evidence: Current single worker and WAL Online Backup are source/fixture characterized, but production async backup, final ABI, keyring preservation and deployment quiescence are unverified.

crossLaneAssumptions.assumption: W3 and W5 estimate ranges are additive.
crossLaneAssumptions.w3Evidence: W3 4.5k-7.25k and W5 4.5k-7.5k share command/event/storage/backup work and must be counted once.

nextAction: Return findings to W3 and W5 owners, then rerun focused reciprocal review before controller adoption.
